    G

    GameController - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game
    Controller for the main game view.
    GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.GameController
     
    GameLogic - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.model.gameLogic
    Manages the core game logic for the Escritura Rapida game.
    GameLogic() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.model.gameLogic.GameLogic
    Constructs a new GameLogic instance with the starting level set to 1.
    GameStage - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.view
    Represents the primary application window for Escritura Rapida.
    GameStage() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.view.GameStage
    Constructs and displays the main application window.
    gameTimer - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.GameController
    Controls the countdown timer for each level.
    GameTimer - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer
    Manages the countdown timer for each game level.
    GameTimer(Label, Consumer, Runnable) - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.GameTimer
    Constructs a new GameTimer with the specified UI label and callbacks.
    generateRandom() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.words.IWords
    Generates and returns the next word to be displayed to the player.
    generateRandom() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.words.Words
    Returns the next word from the shuffled word pool.
    getPoints() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.gameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the player's current level.
    getTiempoActual() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.gameLogic.GameLogic
    Calculates the time allowed for the current level in seconds.
    getTiempoRestante() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.GameTimer
    Returns the number of seconds remaining in the current countdown.
    getTiempoRestante() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.IGameTimer
    Returns the number of seconds remaining in the current countdown.
    goToFinal(int, String, int, boolean) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.GameController
    Navigates to the final results screen, passing the game outcome data.
    goToWelcome() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.FinalController
    Navigates back to the welcome screen.
